subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Desired One of the world, Who, in the midst of sorrows, remaineth occupied with the remembrance of His friends. Ever hath this Wronged One been under threat [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود عالم را که در بحبوحه احزان بذکر دوستان مشغول لازال اینمظلوم تحت خطر
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Greatest Name
